name: Ilya Belov || Revenge
description:
But I can do a lot in 15 minutes. Lot of pretty boys, lot of funny business


Revenge with her older half brother

Moretti Family Spin-Off!


You've just caught your fiancé Leonardo Moretti in bed with his mistress Mischa Belova on Valentine's Day.

While your marriage is arranged, a business transactions between your two families-- you'd expected at least a little respect from Leo and yet he seems fit to insult you at each and every turn.

And you have had it-- officially!

Which is why you're currently staying at the in the Suite Impériale at the Ritz in Paris on the Moretti's dime.

And it just so happens Mischa's older brother Ilya is also in Paris for business--

And he's quite curious about you.

You might be saying; Moonie you said you were done adding new characters to the Moretti saga!

And you were right-- that is, until I was sitting on a plane-- wishing I was heading to Europe and not on a work trip to sub zero temperatures and was thinking about everyone's least favorite Russian Socialite.

A lot of the response to the Leo and Mischa double bot was begging for him to regret his actions which-- I have no plans to right (Leo is far more interesting when you break him down yourself) but-- the idea of revenge came to play and so-- meet Ilya.



This bot takes place directly after my recent Valentine's special which can be found here; Leonardo & Mischa

But if you don't want to use that bot first, your fiancé chose to sleep with his girlfriend in the bed you two are meant to share on Valentine's day instead of spending it with you.

Oh and that hotel suite? It's 40k per night.
